description: V1 from web search: 4 competitors named, no pricing, no reviews. Rubric score 3/10.
Added pricing for all 4 competitors, found 5th. Rubric: pricing +2. Score 5/10.
Fetched App Store reviews for Jobber, Housecall Pro, ServiceTitan — extracted top complaints. Rubric: feature gaps +2. Score 7/10.
Added G2 quotes per competitor — score unchanged (7). Quotes added volume not specificity. Reverted.
Synthesized feature gap analysis into ranked top-5 list with evidence per feature. Rubric: top-5 ranking +1. Score 8/10. GOAL MET.
